name: Turkey or Chicken Tetrazzini I.e.s.jjgf65a
recipeIngredient: 1 cup light cream or evaporated milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a skillet and add mushrooms, cook for 2 minutes.
2. Add flour, broth, cream, salt, and pepper. Cook over low heat, stirring until thickened.
3. Pour the mushroom sauce into a 2-quart casserole dish. In a large bowl, mix turkey and chicken with the mushroom sauce mixture and spaghetti.
4. Spoon half of the cheese into this mixture.
5. Transfer to the casserole dish and sprinkle the rest of the cheese on top.
6. Bake at 400 degrees for 20 minutes or until hot and bubbly. Can be made in advance and frozen. Yield: 8 servings.
